mapper.select: /* PotholeMapper.selectNextReportSeq - 접수번호 추출 */ SELECT MAX(report_no) FROM pothole WHERE report_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, #{today}, '%')

/* PotholeMapper.selectNextDocNo - 문서번호 추출 */ SELECT CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-', #{docGb}, '-', LPAD( IFNULL( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 8, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0 ) + 1, 3, '0' ) ) AS next_doc_no FROM pothole WHERE doc_no LIKE CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '-', #{docGb}, '-%')
mapper.insert:
/* 접수하기 */ INSERT INTO pothole
report_no, doc_no, report_date, status_cd, site_cd, admin_site_cd, lat, lng, accuracy_m, captured_at, captured_ts, addr, cell_phone, detail_info, delivery_note, receiver_id, reg_ip, process_note, manager_id, direction_cd, weather_cd, temp, sta_meters, sta_km_decimal, sta_text, receipt_gb_cd,
#{reportNo}, #{docNo}, #{reportDate}, #{statusCd}, #{siteCd}, #{adminSiteCd}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{accuracyM}, #{capturedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{capturedTs}, #{addr},
HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{cellPhone}, 'RSOS')),
#{detailInfo}, #{deliveryNote}, #{receiverId}, #{regIp}, #{processNote}, #{managerId}, #{directionCd}, #{weatherCd}, #{temp}, #{staMeters}, #{staKmDecimal}, #{staText}, #{receiptGbCd},
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT( 'I', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%y%m%d'), LPAD( IFNULL( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(report_no, 8, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0 ) + 1, 3, '0' ) ) AS next_no FROM pothole WHERE report_no LIKE CONCAT('I', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%y%m%d'), '%')

/* 작업내용 조회 */ SELECT si.site_name AS siteName , p.report_no AS reportNo , p.receiver_id AS receiverId , p.report_date AS reportDate , p.direction_cd AS directionCd , c2.CD_CODE_NM AS directionNm , p.addr AS addr , p.detail_info AS detailInfo , p.delivery_note AS deliveryNote , p.manager_id AS managerId , p.work_start_at AS workStartAt , p.work_end_at AS workEndAt , DATE_FORMAT(p.work_end_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS workEndDateTimeFmt , p.process_note AS processNote , p.status_cd AS statusCd , p.site_cd AS siteCd , p.admin_site_cd AS adminSiteCd , p.sta_meters AS staMeters , p.sta_km_decimal AS staKmDecimal , FORMAT(p.sta_km_decimal, 3) AS staKmDecimalText , p.sta_text AS staText , au.USER_NM AS userNm , au.USER_NM AS managerNm , p.receipt_gb_cd AS receiptGbCd , c.CD_CODE_NM AS receiptGbNm FROM pothole p LEFT JOIN site_info si ON p.site_cd = si.site_cd and si.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON p.receiver_id = au.USER_ID and au.USE_YN = 1 LEFT JOIN cd_common c ON p.receipt_gb_cd = c.CD_CODE and c.CD_DIV = '006' and c.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cd_common c2 ON p.direction_cd = c2.CD_CODE and c2.CD_DIV = 'ROAD_DIR' and c2.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} AND p.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.update:
/* 접수내용수정 */ UPDATE pothole
receiver_id = #{receiverId},
update_id = #{updateId},
report_date = #{reportDate},
receipt_gb_cd = #{receiptGbCd},
direction_cd = #{directionCd},
process_note = #{processNote},
detail_info = #{detailInfo},
delivery_note = #{deliveryNote},
lat = #{lat},
lng = #{lng},
accuracy_m = #{accuracyM},
captured_at = #{capturedAt},
captured_ts = #{capturedTs},
addr = #{addr},
weather_cd = #{weatherCd},
sta_meters = #{staMeters},
sta_km_decimal = #{staKmDecimal},
sta_text = #{staText},
update_ip = #{updateIp},
update_datetime = NOW()
WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}

/* 작업하기 */ UPDATE pothole
manager_id = #{managerId},
update_id = #{updateId},
work_start_at = #{workStartAt},
work_end_at = IFNULL(work_end_at, NOW()),
process_note = #{processNote},
status_cd = #{statusCd},
work_weather_cd = #{workWeatherCd},
work_temp = #{workTempC},
update_datetime = NOW()
, update_ip = #{updateIp}
WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS today_total_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN p.status_cd = 'RECEIVED' THEN 1 END) AS today_received_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN p.status_cd = 'WORKING' THEN 1 END) AS today_processing_cnt FROM pothole p WHERE p.report_date >= CURDATE() AND p.report_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND del_yn = 'N' AND ( p.site_cd IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM site_info child JOIN admin_user_site aus ON aus.site_cd = COALESCE(child.parent_site_cd, child.site_cd) WHERE child.site_cd = p.site_cd AND child.del_yn = 'N' AND aus.user_id = #{userId} ) )
SELECT COALESCE(snap_lat, lat) AS lat, COALESCE(snap_lng, lng) AS lng, addr FROM pothole WHERE report_no = #{value} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pothole_history ( report_no, action_type, changed_fields, before_data, after_data, action_user_id, action_memo, action_datetime ) VALUES ( #{reportNo}, #{actionType}, #{changedFields}, #{beforeData}, #{afterData}, #{actionUserId}, #{actionMemo}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT parent_site_cd FROM site_info WHERE site_cd = #{siteCd} AND del_yn = 'N'
